# Compare and Deploy Expert Skill

This skill covers schema comparison, deployment script generation, publish orchestration, ownership
policy, target database context, and destructive-change handling in pgPacTool.

## Use this skill when changing
- comparer behavior
- publish orchestration
- deployment script generation
- ownership enforcement
- target database resolution
- pre/post deployment script handling
- deployment reporting semantics
